original_do_not_merge.reason: Different legal entities: MaBSTOA and MTA Bus Company are separate operating authorities. The shared identity key is a collision, not a merge.
Both are committees, but entity_nyct-mta-bus-committee-charter is the Committee on Operations of NYCT/etc., which is a different committee from the NYC Transit Committee.
